title: Woodiertexas' Desserts
description: Adds various desserts to Minecraft. (Currently a placeable pumpkin pie for now)
body:
🥧 About Woodiertexas' Desserts

What this mod does is add various desserts to Minecraft with special twists. (hopefully, currently adds only a placeable pumpkin pie; thanks TheNukeLore)

🥧 Credits

  • TheNukeLore - Feature idea and pumpkin pie textures
